commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=73629787039e659a4f7710e6d7ecc906d2a3e9aa)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes memory-core to use QMD `limits.timeoutMs` as the outer `memory_search` deadline, adds a regression test, and updates QMD memory docs.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +43, Docs +13. Total +67 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.9 still use a fixed 15s `memory_search` wrapper while QMD docs/config expose `memory.qmd.limits.timeoutMs`; the contributor also provided redacted before/after QMD runtime logs showing a post-patch search completing after 23922ms.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical repair to keep non-QMD branches on the existing 15s guard while preserving the QMD timeout fix.

target.title: fix(memory): respect QMD timeout for memory_search
target.body:
## Summary
- use the resolved QMD `memory.qmd.limits.timeoutMs` as the `memory_search` tool deadline for QMD-backed searches
- keep the existing 15s default for non-QMD memory search paths
- strengthen the regression test so a configured 45s QMD search is still pending and un-aborted at 15s, then times out and aborts at 45s
- document that QMD `limits.timeoutMs` also controls the `memory_search` tool deadline and add a manual smoke test for checking gateway/backend logs after raising the timeout

## Manual smoke test
After applying this branch to an installation with QMD memory enabled:
1. Set `memory.qmd.limits.timeoutMs` above 15000, e.g. `45000`, and restart the gateway.
2. Run `memory_search` from a tool-enabled agent session with a query known to take longer than 15s on that machine.
3. Inspect gateway/backend logs for that search window. The old `memory_search timed out after 15s` failure should not appear. If the search still exceeds the configured budget, the unavailable payload should report the configured timeout, e.g. `memory_search timed out after 45s`.

## Tests
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/memory-core/src/tools.ts extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/memory-qmd.md docs/reference/memory-config.md`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `node scripts/test-extension.mjs memory-core extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/tools.citations.test.ts`
- `node scripts/test-extension.mjs memory-core`
target.author: bdjben
